overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a hooded robe ascending a spiral stone staircase inside a gothic castle. The environment features stone walls, wooden ceiling beams, ornate metal railings, and framed portraits, illuminated by warm wall-mounted lanterns against a cool, atmospheric color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase tower with timber ceiling

events.description: gothic arched window with stone tracery comes into view on the right wall

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily up the spiral staircase, following the curve to the left

entered.detail: ornate black wrought iron railing with decorative scrollwork
grey stone block walls with white wooden wainscoting
heavy dark wooden ceiling beams and supports
lit wall-mounted lantern with warm yellow glow
pointed arch window with stone tracery and statue visible through glass

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the lower portion of a spiral staircase inside a stone tower. Heavy timber beams span the ceiling above, while an ornate black metal railing curves along the right side. Warm light from wall-mounted lanterns illuminates the grey stone walls, and a gothic arched window with a statue visible through it appears on the right wall as the character climbs higher.

events.description: first framed portrait appears on the left wall
two portraits appear side by side on the left wall

agents.ego_description: character continues ascending the spiral staircase, passing framed portraits on the wall

entered.detail: rectangular framed painting of a figure in historical dress
two matching framed portraits hung side by side on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues upward through the spiral staircase, now passing a series of framed portraits hung on the left stone wall. The timber ceiling and gothic window from below are no longer visible as the staircase curves. The lighting remains warm and atmospheric from wall-mounted lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase landing with corridor archway

events.description: character reaches a landing with an arched corridor entrance visible to the right
statue in wall niche becomes visible on the left

agents.ego_description: character walks past a landing with an archway corridor and continues ascending past a statue niche

entered.detail: stone archway leading to a dark corridor with wooden paneling
recessed wall niche containing a robed statue figure

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an intermediate landing where a stone archway opens to a corridor on the right, offering a glimpse of a darker hallway beyond. The ascent continues past a recessed niche containing a robed statue on the left wall. The spiral staircase maintains its narrow enclosed form with the ornate railing curving continuously upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase top landing with wooden door

events.description: large wooden double door comes into view at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: character approaches the final wooden door at the top of the spiral staircase

entered.detail: large dark wooden double door with paneling at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character nears the top of the spiral staircase, where a large dark wooden double door marks the destination. The stone walls continue to curve around with the ornate railing, and the warm lantern light illuminates the final approach to the door. The statue niche and corridor archway from below have passed out of view as the character completes the ascent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a spiral stone staircase that leads from the lower tower depths toward a heavy wooden doorway at the top. It begins with the character climbing past heavy timber ceiling beams and a gothic arched window, with warm lantern light casting a glow over the grey stone walls and ornate metal railings. As the staircase curves upward, the view shifts away from the window to reveal a series of framed portraits lining the left wall. The camera then passes an intermediate landing where a stone archway opens into a dark corridor and a recessed niche holds a robed statue, before the path narrows once more. Finally, the ascent concludes as the character approaches a set of large dark wooden double doors that mark the end of the spiral climb.
